beats.narrative: Player wakes in the starter village: a small grass-ringed home plot with no encounters. jan Sewi runs the starter ceremony; jan Pona Tomo, jan Telo Well, jan Poki Tomo, and jan Kili Tomo provide ambient two-beat village dialog. Walking up to jan Sewi fires the starter ceremony and offers the three starters: kon_moli, telo_jaki, and jan_ike_lili. Picking one sets starter_chosen, drops three poki_lili, adds the chosen creature to the party at level 5, and unlocks the eastern warp.

Long forest path-route east-to-west, framed by trees. Three tall-grass rectangles host the player's first encounters across the level 3-7 band: jan_ike_lili, jan_utala_lili, soweli_musi, soweli_kili, soweli_jaki, waso_pimeja, soweli_anpa, soweli_kon, jan_moli, waso_toki, akesi_linja, and soweli_nena. Four ambient route walkers plus jan Ike bring the map to five NPC markers. Defeating jan Ike, or losing and restoring at the last village, opens the eastern warp.

Mountain pass with stone footpaths between blocked cliffs, rocks, and tall-grass clumps. Encounters skew force-typed and rocky: jan_wawa, jan_wawa_linja, jan_wawa_jaki, sijelo_kiwen, soweli_palisa, waso_lape, akesi_seli, and soweli_sewi. Route NPCs provide ambient travel dialog. At the top, the Highridge master blocks the northward path. Winning sets badge_sewi and records the highridge-proof clue.

Round village built on a stone island in the middle of a lake. No tall grass and no random encounters: this is a story-and-shop beat. The Lakehaven master waits in the plaza; beating him sets badge_telo and records the lakehaven-proof clue. Lake-village NPCs fill the floor, and the stall sells capture pods and healing fruit for coins.

Cold-land village with snow and ice ground, stone paths, snow tall grass, trees, houses, rocks, and a fenced herb garden. Encounters mix sijelo_linja, sijelo_kiwen, jan_pi_sewi_pimeja, waso_lete, soweli_nena, soweli_kiwen, and sijelo_utala at levels 7-12. The Frostvale master anchors the village challenge. Beating him sets badge_lete and records the frostvale-proof clue.

The great peak is the hardest region-master challenge before the endgame: a tall narrow cave-shrine with stone floors, blocked rock walls, torch landmarks, and sparse encounter overgrowth. Encounters are heavy elites: jan_wawa_suli, jan_wawa_utala, jan_utala_suli, soweli_utala, sijelo_utala, waso_moku, waso_moli, soweli_sewi, soweli_alasa, and soweli_wawa at levels 10-15. Cave NPCs flesh out the climb before the Dreadpeak master. Beating him sets badge_suli and records the dreadpeak-proof clue.

Endgame approach: long riverside route with a grassy west bank, deep water channel, sandbar path, and two aquatic encounter patches. Encounters include jan_moli, kon_moli, telo_jaki, kala_telo, kala_uta, kala_tomo, jan_moli_wawa, kala_luka, seli_moli, akesi_suli, and the rare akesi_sewi across levels 7-13. jan Kala Lili, jan Moku Pona, jan Kala Suli, jan Olin Telo, and jan Suno Telo populate the bank. With all four region badges in hand, final_boss_trigger fires the akesi_sewi cutscene; the green-dragon clear path plays the green dragon defeat animation.
